evals.expected_output: A briefing with recent commits, uncommitted work, and suggested next step — even when on the main branch. Should NOT bail out with 'On main — nothing to catch up on.'

assertions.description: Skill does NOT output 'On main — nothing to catch up on' or similar bail-out message
Output contains a concrete suggested next action (proves full briefing was produced, not just headers)
Output contains a Recent Changes section listing commits

evals.expected_output: Briefing contains accurate data from actual repo state: correct branch name, real commit messages, and correct uncommitted files.

assertions.description: Output states the current branch is 'main'
Output references the most recent real commit (catchup/grill-me/changelog skills)
Output references the nWave framework commit
Output mentions the actual uncommitted file: catchup/SKILL.md
